title: Introducing the Canton Network: A blockchain financial institutions can say 'yes' to
quote: Digital Asset announced the Canton Network in May 2023 — a privacy-enabled blockchain designed for institutional financial markets and synchronized asset transactions across previously isolated systems. Founding members include BNP Paribas, Broadridge, Deutsche Börse Group, Goldman Sachs, Microsoft, and Moody's.

title: Canton Network
quote: The Global Synchronizer launched on MainNet in June 2024, followed by Canton Coin in July 2024.

title: Leading Market Participants Partner with the Linux Foundation to Form the Global Synchronizer Foundation
quote: GSF will 'facilitate transparent and fair governance of the Global Synchronizer, the interoperability backbone of the Canton Network.' Announced July 1, 2024; founding members include Broadridge, Digital Asset, Euroclear, SBI Digital Asset Holdings, Tradeweb.

title: How Canton Network Delivers Institutional-Grade Privacy
quote: Smart contracts ensure each party only receives and records the parts of a transaction that apply to them, sharing data only on a need-to-know basis. Operators of network infrastructure don't see transaction data, they are only able to see limited metadata needed to ensure ordering and consistency.

title: Canton: A Daml based ledger interoperability protocol
Canton Coin: A Canton-Network-native payment application
Canton Coin: Rewarding Utility
quote: Canton Coin was launched with no pre-mine, no pre-sale, and no special allocations to founders, VCs, or foundations. Every Canton Coin in circulation today has been earned through participation in the network.

title: Tokenomics and Rewards
quote: Canton Coin tokenomics are executed in discrete minting cycles called rounds. A new round starts every 10 minutes, an interval called a 'tick' or 'round interval'. Until mid-2029, applications are eligible for 62% of the reward pool, with Super Validator allocations decreasing to 20%.

title: daml-finance (digital-asset/daml-finance)
quote: Daml Finance is an open source library providing purpose-built libraries for enterprise-grade tokenization: instruments, accounts, settlement and lifecycling.

title: Daml Finance — Introduction
quote: Daml Finance supports the modeling of financial and non-financial use cases in Daml. It provides a standard way to represent assets on Daml ledgers and defines common behaviours and rules.

title: Goldman Sachs' Tokenization Platform GS DAP, Leveraging Daml, Goes Live
quote: Goldman Sachs' new digital asset platform GS DAP is live, one year into their engagement of Digital Asset. First issuance was the EIB's EUR 100 million digital bond settled same day on the Luxembourg Stock Exchange.

title: GS DAP
quote: Goldman Sachs Digital Asset Platform (GS DAP) is natively on Canton Network, providing market-leading tokenization services for regulated financial markets.

title: Deutsche Börse Clearstream's D7 issues €10 billion+ in digital securities
quote: D7 already processed over 250,000 digital issuances. With up to 15,000 new digital issuances added on a weekly basis, D7 is positioned as a leading digital financial market infrastructure.

title: Customer story: Deutsche Börse and Clearstream
quote: Clearstream's D7 digital post-trade platform is built with Daml. Platforms such as HSBC Orion, GS DAP, BNP Paribas Neobonds and Broadridge DLR, all built on Digital Asset's Daml, show how digital advancements can enhance capital markets.

title: HKEX launches Synapse stock settlement platform using DAML smart contracts
quote: HKEX Synapse is a smart-contract-driven platform using Digital Asset's DAML smart contract language, targeting Northbound Stock Connect settlement; launched October 2023.

title: HKEX Connects Hong Kong and Mainland China Markets with DAML
quote: Synapse, powered by Daml, provides a single source of truth for settlement instruction workflow and simultaneously creates settlement instructions to all parties along the chain, enabling concurrent processing for Stock Connect.

title: Broadridge's Distributed Ledger Repo Platform Processes $368 Billion in Average Daily Trade Volumes in November
quote: The DLR platform processed an average of $368 billion in daily repo transactions in November 2025, with volumes totaling $7.4 trillion.

title: Broadridge's DLT repo platform goes into production
quote: Broadridge launched its Distributed Ledger Repo (DLR) solution in mid-2021; the service employs Daml smart contracts from Digital Asset and VMware Blockchain.

title: Digital Asset open sources its smart contract language DAML
quote: On April 4, 2019, Digital Asset announced that the DAML smart contract language, runtime, and SDK are freely available under an Apache 2.0 open source license.

title: digital-asset/daml — The Daml smart contract language
quote: License: Apache-2.0. Primary language Haskell (66.6%). Repository hosts the Daml compiler and SDK.

title: digital-asset/canton — Global Workflow Composition
quote: Canton is a next-generation Daml ledger interoperability protocol that implements Daml's built-in models of authorization and privacy faithfully. License: Apache-2.0. Scala ~96% of codebase, 138 releases.

title: Reference: Choices
quote: The controller is a comma-separated list of values, where each value is either a party or a collection of parties. The conjunction of all the parties are required to authorize when this choice is exercised. Choice observers see all the consequences of the action.

title: Build Integration with the Ledger API
quote: Daml platform exposes a gRPC Ledger API. Daml assistant offers two code generators that convert DAML-LF to idiomatic representations in Java or TypeScript.

title: HTTP JSON API Service
quote: The JSON API is a simpler, JSON-based alternative to the gRPC Ledger API, used by the JavaScript/TypeScript bindings and recommended for single-page web apps.

title: React to Off-Ledger Events: Daml Script
quote: Daml Script provides a simple way of testing Daml models and scripting commands from multiple parties. It can run in Daml Studio, via the CLI, against a Sandbox, or against any running Ledger.

title: Test Daml Contracts
quote: The daml assistant CLI supports sandbox, script-based tests (Daml Script), and DAR packaging.

title: Smart Contract Upgrade
quote: Smart Contract Upgrade (SCU) allows Daml models (DAR packages) to be updated on Canton transparently, provided guidelines are followed. SCU requires DAML-LF 1.17 and Canton Protocol version 7.

title: Introducing Splice, a New Hyperledger Lab for Canton Network Interoperability
quote: Splice provides open source code (Apache 2.0) for operating a decentralized Canton synchronizer, including the Amulet reference application. Developed by Digital Asset and hosted under Hyperledger Labs.

title: hyperledger-labs/splice
quote: Reference applications for funding, operating, and incentivizing the use of a decentralized, public Canton synchronizer, including the Amulet reference application.

title: Validator Onboarding Process — Splice documentation
quote: New validators need a sponsoring Super Validator, must provide a fixed egress IP address, and onboarding secrets are one-time use and expire after 48 hours. Mainnet is in an invite-only phase.

title: Enterprise Suite for Canton
quote: Digital Asset offers an enterprise distribution of Canton with complementary application modules: enterprise-grade validator nodes, integration components (PQS, Shell), composable DA Utilities, and infrastructure for private subnets. Enterprise releases are available on request.

title: Digital Asset, Builder of Privacy-Focused Blockchain Canton, Raises $135M
quote: Digital Asset raised USD 135 million in June 2025; round co-led by DRW Venture Capital and Tradeweb Markets with participation from BNP Paribas, Citadel Securities, DTCC, Goldman Sachs, and Circle Ventures.

title: What do you mean by blockchain interoperability?
quote: The Canton protocol was built from the ground up to overcome the problem of interoperability between separate blockchain instances. Canton guarantees atomicity of cross-subnet transactions whenever participants share a common domain.

title: Multi-chain and bridges for regulated finance
quote: The Canton Network enables native interop across Canton subnets without a layer 2 protocol or asset bridge; bridges have narrow use connecting Canton to external chains like Ethereum.

title: Daml: A Smart Contract Language for Securely Automating Real-World Multi-Party Business Workflows
quote: Daml is an open-source smart contract language built on Haskell with strict evaluation, designed around three desiderata: capturing legal rules, specifying authorization policies, and composing workflows. The abstract ledger model provides clear semantics for authorization, double-spending protection, and privacy guarantees.

title: About The Foundation — Canton Foundation
quote: The Canton Foundation (Global Synchronizer Foundation) is the open governance body for the Global Synchronizer, under the Linux Foundation umbrella.

title: 5 Developer Pathways for Canton Builders
quote: Canton builders can develop against private Canton nodes, consortium synchronizers, DevNet, TestNet, or MainNet, selecting the topology that matches their regulatory and composability needs.

title: Broadridge's DLR Platform Processes $385 Billion in Average Daily Trade Volumes in October
quote: DLR processed an average of $385 billion in daily repo transactions in October 2025, representing roughly 3% of the U.S. repo market.
